description: A valid repair estimate is high relative to the synthetic reference value of the covered device.
source_datasets: Item 7 claim evidence metadata; Item 4 policy eligibility lookup; device value reference
trigger_condition: Valid repair estimate is greater than or equal to 65% of the covered device reference value.
required_inputs: claim_id; valid repair estimate; covered device brand and model; device value reference

description: A controlled case-pattern service identifies a related prior claim event on the same policy and covered device.
source_datasets: Item 5 prior claims history and/or Item 6 prior submitted claim records; controlled case-pattern reconciliation output
trigger_condition: A related prior event exists for the same policy and covered device inside the 30-calendar-day review window, and the reconciliation service supplies a corroborated relation signal. Date proximity alone is insufficient.
required_inputs: claim_id; policy_id; covered device identifier; related event reference; event date; corroborated relation signal

description: A valid repair estimate exists but no active device value reference can be found for the covered device model.
source_datasets: Item 7 claim evidence metadata; Item 4 policy eligibility lookup; device value reference
trigger_condition: Valid repair estimate exists and no active matching brand-model reference-value row is available.
required_inputs: claim_id; valid repair estimate; covered device brand and model; device value reference
